descriptions: Specialized in Web Development and Cloud Computing.
Led a team of 5 members in the final year capstone project.
Built multiple production-ready web applications using React and Node.js.
Gained hands-on experience with CI/CD pipelines and deployment.
Achieved AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate certification.
Learning advanced serverless architectures and microservices.
Focusing on system scalability, security, and high performance.
